accessibility.rammemorynotice.not_enough: To enjoy this modded Mine craft, allocate more RAM to Mine craft.
info.rammemorynotice.not_enough_memory_t:
To enjoy this modded Minecraft, you should allocate more RAM to Minecraft.
If you do not allocate enough RAM to Minecraft, it will be lagging and may cause crashes.
info.rammemorynotice.not_enough_memory_h: If you are using Minecraft Launcher, find the installation from [Installations] and press [Edit] in [...] to open the [Edit installation]. In this menu, extend [MORE OPTIONS] and edit [JVM ARGUMENTS]. Replace [2] in [-Xmx2G] into a larger number to allocate more RAM to Minecraft.

If you are using Curse Forge Launcher, open [Settings] by clicking the gear icon at the lower left. Then, select [Minecraft] in [Game Specific]. Scroll to the bottom and manipulate the orange bar of [Allocated Memory] to change the allocated RAM to Minecraft.
